response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications including C programming for UNIX embedded systems, Linux kernel modification experience, native-level Japanese proficiency, and any demonstrated background in network switch security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X; their experience is predominantly in web/mobile stacks with TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with no evidence of embedded firmware or networking security domain expertise.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated ability to build and maintain open-source tools and infrastructure
Active contributor to developer education through workshops and talks
concerns: No proven experience with C in embedded UNIX environments or Linux kernel modification
Lacks native Japanese proficiency — a hard requirement for the role
No exposure to LAN-switch security technologies, Layer-2/3 networking, or embedded hardware control

key_factors.factor: No embedded C or Linux kernel experience
Lack of networking security domain knowledge
